zh.lifeSummary: 當Lachlan MacLean 10th. Chief of Clan MacLean於大約1456年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特德華爾特 卡素時，他的父親Hector Odhar MacLean 9th Clan  Chief13歲，母親Marjorie Mackintosh of Mackintosh12歲。他和Marion Maclean至少有1個兒子。他去世於1513年9月9日在英國諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓享年58歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾德華爾特 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: MacLean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLean
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Eáin, ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) John’. Compare Irish McAloon and McGlone .

History: This is the name of a major Scottish clan traditionally associated with the island of Mull, which claims descent from Gille Eáin na Tuaidh (‘Gillean of the Battleaxe’), who lived in the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: Lachlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Scottish Gaelic Lachlann (earlier Lochlann), said to refer originally to a migrant from Norway, the ‘land of the lochs’. The name was traditionally used only in families with some Highlands connection and still retains a very Scottish flavour. However, it has now acquired wide popular appeal, especially in Australia and New Zealand.

variants.name: Lachlann
meanings: From Scottish Gaelic Lachlann (earlier Lochlann), said to refer originally to a migrant from Norway, the ‘land of the lochs’. The name was traditionally used only in families with some Highlands connection and still retains a very Scottish flavour. However, it has now acquired wide popular appeal, especially in Australia and New Zealand.

en.lifeSummary: When Lachlan MacLean 10th. Chief of Clan MacLean was born about 1456, in Duart Castle, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Hector Odhar MacLean 9th Clan  Chief, was 13 and his mother, Marjorie Mackintosh of Mackintosh, was 12. He had at least 1 son with Marion Maclean. He died on 9 September 1513, in Branxton, Northumberland, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lachlan MacLean 10th. Chief of Clan MacLean est né environ 1456, à Duart Castle, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hector Odhar MacLean 9th Clan  Chief, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Marjorie Mackintosh of Mackintosh, avait 12 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Marion Maclean. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1513, à Branxton, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Duart Castle, Argyll, Écosse.

de.Duart Castle, Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scot: Duart Castle, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lachlan MacLean 10th. Chief of Clan MacLean um 1456 in Duart Castle, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hector Odhar MacLean 9th Clan  Chief 13 und seine Mutter Marjorie Mackintosh of Mackintosh 12. Er hatte mit Marion Maclean mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 9. September 1513 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Branxton, Northumberland, England und wurde in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lachlan MacLean 10th. Chief of Clan MacLean è nato il circa 1456 nel Duart Castle, Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Hector Odhar MacLean 9th Clan  Chief, aveva 13 anni e il suo madre, Marjorie Mackintosh of Mackintosh, aveva 12 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Marion Maclean. Morì il 9 settembre 1513, nel Branxton, Northumberland, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lachlan MacLean 10th. Chief of Clan MacLeanが約1456年にイギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトダアルト カストルで生まれた時，父Hector Odhar MacLean 9th Clan  Chiefは13歳，母Marjorie Mackintosh of Mackintoshは12歳であった。彼はMarion Macleanとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1513年9月9日にイギリスノースウンバーランドブランクストンで58歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルダアルト カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.Duart Castle, Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scot: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 단아르트 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: Lachlan MacLean 10th. Chief of Clan MacLean(이)가 대략 1456년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 단아르트 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hector Odhar MacLean 9th Clan  Chief(은)는 13세였고, 그의 어머니 Marjorie Mackintosh of Mackintosh(은)는 12세였다. 그는 Marion Maclean(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1513년 9월 9일 영국 노르스벌랜드 브랜스턴에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 단아르트 카스틀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lachlan MacLean 10th. Chief of Clan MacLean nasceu aproximadamente 1456, em Duart Castle, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hector Odhar MacLean 9th Clan  Chief, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Marjorie Mackintosh of Mackintosh, tinha 12 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Marion Maclean. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1513, em Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.Duart Castle, Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scot: дуарт кастл, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lachlan MacLean 10th. Chief of Clan MacLean родился около 1456 г. в местности дуарт кастл, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hector Odhar MacLean 9th Clan  Chief было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Marjorie Mackintosh of Mackintosh, 12. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Marion Maclean. Он умер 9 сентября 1513 г. в местности бранкстон, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности дуарт кастл, аргилл, Шотландия.
